preview.title: Preview
preview.label: Live Preview
preview.description: Show Steam's official live preview alongside the editor

developer.title: Developer
developer.debugDescription: Show detailed logs in the console for troubleshooting

language.title: Language
language.label: Interface Language
language.description: Set the display language of the editor interface

imageUpload.title: Image Upload
imageUpload.autoDescription: Automatically upload images to Steam after adding to the image pool (when rename option is on, rename first then upload)
imageUpload.pasteRenameDescription: Automatically select the filename for renaming after pasting an image to the image pool
imageUpload.dropRenameDescription: Automatically select the filename for renaming after dropping an image to the image pool
imageUpload.tip: When auto-upload is off, images are still inserted into the editor with local preview. Manual upload selection will be available in a future version.

imagePool.title: Image Pool Display
imagePool.pageSizeDescription: Number of images displayed per page in the image pool. 0 shows all
imagePool.thumbSizeDescription: Display size of thumbnails in the image pool

contextMenu.title: Context Menu
contextMenu.selectionDesc: Menu shown when right-clicking selected text
contextMenu.emptyDesc: Menu shown when right-clicking empty space in the editor
contextMenu.imageDesc: Menu shown when right-clicking an image in the editor
contextMenu.imagePoolDesc: Menu shown when right-clicking an image in the image pool

tour.title: Onboarding Tour
tour.replayNote: Replay is purely demonstrative and won't change any settings
